name: Pujol
description: Enrique Olvera's flagship restaurant, consistently ranked among the world's best. The mole madre — aged over 1,000 days — is the centerpiece. Tasting menu only, book well in advance.
address: Tennyson 133, Polanco, Miguel Hidalgo, 11550 Ciudad de México

name: Contramar
description: Roma Norte institution serving impeccable Mexican seafood since 1998. The tuna tostadas and red-and-green grilled fish are legendary. Loud, packed, and worth every minute of the wait.
address: Durango 200, Roma Norte, Cuauhtémoc, 06700 Ciudad de México
